resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived ACTN3 rs1815739 CT call is available. This is aging and fitness trait context only and does not predict lifespan, longevity, biological age, frailty, disease risk, supplement needs, diet needs, or treatment needs.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: ACTN3 is discussed in fitness research, but longevity and healthy aging depend on many genetic and non-genetic factors.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived ACE ID context row is available. This is not enough to estimate lifespan, biological age, disease risk, frailty, supplement response, lifestyle needs, lab status, medication response, or treatment needs.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: ACE can provide performance-trait context, but it does not determine longevity, biological age, frailty, disease risk, or clinical actionability.
